claim: JCVI-Syn3A has a measured doubling time of 105 minutes (6,300 s) in rich medium at 37 C.
source_detail: Thornburg 2026 (Cell) reports 105 min as both the measured experimental doubling time and the 4D-WCM-simulated cell-cycle length. Supersedes the earlier Thornburg-2022-era 'approximately 2 h' value (7,200 s).
caveats: Measured for population median / single-cell average; individual cell doubling times have a broad distribution.
Dependent on medium composition - slower in depleted or defined media.
Supersedes the earlier value of 7,200 s (2 h) from Thornburg 2022. The brief's 2 +- 0.5 h validation envelope for Layer 5 comfortably covers this 105 min / 1.75 h.
